dialogueChunks.intro: You have done it, {player_name}. {quest_focus_The} is ours, and there is more than enough to meet our needs. The settlement can breathe easy now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is already putting the {quest_item} to use. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} no longer a worry thanks to your efforts. Even {target_npc} is impressed with what you accomplished.
dialogueChunks.outro: You have earned every bit of what is coming to you, {player_name}. The settlement will not forget this.

dialogueChunks.intro: It was close, but you managed to secure what we needed. {quest_focus_The} came through, barely.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The quantity is tight. {quest_ally} says it will cover {quest_stakes_the} if we are careful with rationing. But the fact remains: without you out there fighting through {quest_threat_the}, we would have nothing at all.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes scraping by is its own kind of victory. Well done, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: You outdid yourself. Not only did you secure {quest_focus_the}, but the surplus opens new possibilities for the settlement.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is already talking about trade opportunities. {quest_ally} says the extra {quest_item} could strengthen our position with neighboring settlements. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} not just met: it is exceeded.
dialogueChunks.outro: You turned a desperate need into an opportunity. {player_name}, you have changed our fortunes.

dialogueChunks.intro: The {enemy_type_plural} are gone and {quest_focus_the} is finally accessible. {player_name}, you opened a door that has been shut for too long.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} sent a team out this morning and they returned loaded down. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} fully secured, and {target_npc} says the supply should last well into the next season. The settlement is already planning how to use the surplus.
dialogueChunks.outro: What you fought for today will feed and shelter people for months. That is a legacy worth having.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the path to {quest_focus_the} is clear for the first time since {quest_origin}. People are already using it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} you destroyed will not be coming back. {quest_ally} confirmed the area is safe for regular travel. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} now a reliable resource instead of a dangerous gamble.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did not just get us what we needed: you made it safe to get more whenever we need it. That changes everything.
